source: deal_export_silver = False
%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"

#Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws, regexp_replace
from pyspark.sql.types import DecimalType

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType

from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "deal_export_silver"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#display values
display(df)
display(df2)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch


#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Silver_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Silver_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)
# Table: electricitydeal: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="electricitydeal"

#Create Silver Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    DealId STRING,
    DealReference STRING,
    CounterpartyID STRING,
    CounterpartyTraderId STRING,
    CounterpartyTrader STRING,
    CounterpartyReference STRING,
    Counterparty STRING,
    DealEntryTrader STRING,
    AuthorisedTrader STRING,
    Status STRING,
    InstrumentId STRING,
    Instrument STRING,
    TradeDate DATE,
    Book STRING,
    BuySell STRING,
    StartDate DATE,
    EndDate DATE,
    DealLeg INT,
    Price DECIMAL(19,4),
    Volume INT,
    SubcommodityID STRING,
    OTCTimeProfileId STRING,
    ASXProduct STRING,
    ASXTypeId STRING,
    Year STRING,
    ASXExpiry STRING,
    YearType STRING,
    ProductCode STRING,
    Strategy STRING,
    OptionEnabled INT,
    OptionType STRING,
    OptionPremium DECIMAL(19,4),
    OptionStrike DECIMAL(19,4),
    OptionPaymentDate DATE,
    OptionExpiryDate DATE,
    Broker STRING,
    Clearer STRING,
    Exchange STRING,
    BrokerFee DECIMAL(19,4),
    BrokerFeeUnits STRING,
    TotalBrokerage DECIMAL(19,4),
    ClearingAccount STRING,
    ClearingFee DECIMAL(19,4),
    ClearingFeeUnits STRING,
    TotalClearingFee DECIMAL(19,4),
    BlockFee DECIMAL(19,4),
    BlockFeeUnits STRING,
    TotalBlockFee DECIMAL(19,4),
    ExchangeFee DECIMAL(19,4),
    ExchangeFeeUnits STRING,
    TotalExchangeFee DECIMAL(19,4),
    StripProductCode STRING,
    StripProductPrice DECIMAL(19,4),
    ExerciseDate DATE,
    LastUpdated TIMESTAMP,
    ExerciseType STRING,
    TimeProfile STRING,
    Subcommodity STRING,
    PremiumPrice DECIMAL(19,4),
    IsCapInstrument INT,
    isAsianOption INT,
    TradeType STRING,
    isSubProduct INT,
    PremiumPaidUpfrontDate DATE,
    PremiumPaidAcrossDeal INT,
    HasSubProducts INT,
	CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCOps INT,
	CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
	HashKey STRING,
	HashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get bronze table latest records
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                SELECT DealId,DealReference,CounterpartyID,CounterpartyTraderId,CounterpartyTrader,CounterpartyReference,Counterparty,DealEntryTrader,AuthorisedTrader,Status,
                InstrumentId,Instrument,TradeDate,Book,BuySell,StartDate,EndDate,DealLeg,Price,Volume,SubcommodityID,OTCTimeProfileId,ASXProduct,ASXTypeId,Year,
                ASXExpiry,YearType,ProductCode,Strategy,OptionEnabled,OptionType,OptionPremium,OptionStrike,OptionPaymentDate,OptionExpiryDate,Broker,Clearer,Exchange,
                BrokerFee,BrokerFeeUnits,TotalBrokerage,ClearingAccount,ClearingFee,ClearingFeeUnits,TotalClearingFee,BlockFee,BlockFeeUnits,TotalBlockFee,ExchangeFee,
                ExchangeFeeUnits,TotalExchangeFee,StripProductCode,StripProductPrice,ExerciseDate,LastUpdated,ExerciseType,TimeProfile,Subcommodity,PremiumPrice,
                IsCapInstrument,isAsianOption,TradeType,isSubProduct,PremiumPaidUpfrontDate,PremiumPaidAcrossDeal,HasSubProducts

                FROM deal_export_bronze.electricitydeal
                WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = 1

# Add CDC columns
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "DealId", "DealLeg"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "DealReference", "CounterpartyID", "CounterpartyTraderId", "CounterpartyTrader", "CounterpartyReference", "Counterparty", "DealEntryTrader", "AuthorisedTrader", "Status", "InstrumentId", "Instrument", "TradeDate", "Book", "BuySell", "StartDate", "EndDate", "Price", "Volume", "SubcommodityID", "OTCTimeProfileId", "ASXProduct", "ASXTypeId", "Year", "ASXExpiry", "YearType", "ProductCode", "Strategy", "OptionEnabled", "OptionType",
                           "OptionPremium", "OptionStrike", "OptionPaymentDate", "OptionExpiryDate", "Broker", "Clearer", "Exchange", "BrokerFee", "BrokerFeeUnits", "TotalBrokerage", "ClearingAccount", "ClearingFee", "ClearingFeeUnits", "TotalClearingFee", "BlockFee", "BlockFeeUnits", "TotalBlockFee", "ExchangeFee", "ExchangeFeeUnits", "TotalExchangeFee", "StripProductCode", "StripProductPrice", "ExerciseDate", "LastUpdated", "ExerciseType", "TimeProfile", "Subcommodity", "PremiumPrice", "IsCapInstrument",
                            "isAsianOption", "TradeType", "isSubProduct", "PremiumPaidUpfrontDate", "PremiumPaidAcrossDeal", "HasSubProducts"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (DealId,DealReference,CounterpartyID,CounterpartyTraderId,CounterpartyTrader,CounterpartyReference,Counterparty,DealEntryTrader,AuthorisedTrader,Status,
              InstrumentId,Instrument,TradeDate,Book,BuySell,StartDate,EndDate,DealLeg,Price,Volume,SubcommodityID,OTCTimeProfileId,ASXProduct,ASXTypeId,Year,
              ASXExpiry,YearType,ProductCode,Strategy,OptionEnabled,OptionType,OptionPremium,OptionStrike,OptionPaymentDate,OptionExpiryDate,Broker,Clearer,Exchange,
              BrokerFee,BrokerFeeUnits,TotalBrokerage,ClearingAccount,ClearingFee,ClearingFeeUnits,TotalClearingFee,BlockFee,BlockFeeUnits,TotalBlockFee,ExchangeFee,
              ExchangeFeeUnits,TotalExchangeFee,StripProductCode,StripProductPrice,ExerciseDate,LastUpdated,ExerciseType,TimeProfile,Subcommodity,PremiumPrice,
              IsCapInstrument,isAsianOption,TradeType,isSubProduct,PremiumPaidUpfrontDate,PremiumPaidAcrossDeal,HasSubProducts,
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.DealId,s.DealReference,s.CounterpartyID,s.CounterpartyTraderId,s.CounterpartyTrader,s.CounterpartyReference,s.Counterparty,s.DealEntryTrader,
              s.AuthorisedTrader,s.Status,s.InstrumentId,s.Instrument,s.TradeDate,s.Book,s.BuySell,s.StartDate,s.EndDate,s.DealLeg,s.Price,s.Volume,s.SubcommodityID,
              s.OTCTimeProfileId,s.ASXProduct,s.ASXTypeId,s.Year,s.ASXExpiry,s.YearType,s.ProductCode,s.Strategy,s.OptionEnabled,s.OptionType,s.OptionPremium,
              s.OptionStrike,s.OptionPaymentDate,s.OptionExpiryDate,s.Broker,s.Clearer,s.Exchange,s.BrokerFee,s.BrokerFeeUnits,s.TotalBrokerage,s.ClearingAccount,
              s.ClearingFee,s.ClearingFeeUnits,s.TotalClearingFee,s.BlockFee,s.BlockFeeUnits,s.TotalBlockFee,s.ExchangeFee,s.ExchangeFeeUnits,s.TotalExchangeFee,
              s.StripProductCode,s.StripProductPrice,s.ExerciseDate,s.LastUpdated,s.ExerciseType,s.TimeProfile,s.Subcommodity,s.PremiumPrice,s.IsCapInstrument,
              s.isAsianOption,s.TradeType,s.isSubProduct,s.PremiumPaidUpfrontDate,s.PremiumPaidAcrossDeal,s.HasSubProducts,
              s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (DealId,DealReference,CounterpartyID,CounterpartyTraderId,CounterpartyTrader,CounterpartyReference,Counterparty,DealEntryTrader,AuthorisedTrader,Status,
              InstrumentId,Instrument,TradeDate,Book,BuySell,StartDate,EndDate,DealLeg,Price,Volume,SubcommodityID,OTCTimeProfileId,ASXProduct,ASXTypeId,Year,
              ASXExpiry,YearType,ProductCode,Strategy,OptionEnabled,OptionType,OptionPremium,OptionStrike,OptionPaymentDate,OptionExpiryDate,Broker,Clearer,Exchange,
              BrokerFee,BrokerFeeUnits,TotalBrokerage,ClearingAccount,ClearingFee,ClearingFeeUnits,TotalClearingFee,BlockFee,BlockFeeUnits,TotalBlockFee,ExchangeFee,
              ExchangeFeeUnits,TotalExchangeFee,StripProductCode,StripProductPrice,ExerciseDate,LastUpdated,ExerciseType,TimeProfile,Subcommodity,PremiumPrice,
              IsCapInstrument,isAsianOption,TradeType,isSubProduct,PremiumPaidUpfrontDate,PremiumPaidAcrossDeal,HasSubProducts,
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.DealId,s.DealReference,s.CounterpartyID,s.CounterpartyTraderId,s.CounterpartyTrader,s.CounterpartyReference,s.Counterparty,s.DealEntryTrader,
              s.AuthorisedTrader,s.Status,s.InstrumentId,s.Instrument,s.TradeDate,s.Book,s.BuySell,s.StartDate,s.EndDate,s.DealLeg,s.Price,s.Volume,s.SubcommodityID,
              s.OTCTimeProfileId,s.ASXProduct,s.ASXTypeId,s.Year,s.ASXExpiry,s.YearType,s.ProductCode,s.Strategy,s.OptionEnabled,s.OptionType,s.OptionPremium,
              s.OptionStrike,s.OptionPaymentDate,s.OptionExpiryDate,s.Broker,s.Clearer,s.Exchange,s.BrokerFee,s.BrokerFeeUnits,s.TotalBrokerage,s.ClearingAccount,
              s.ClearingFee,s.ClearingFeeUnits,s.TotalClearingFee,s.BlockFee,s.BlockFeeUnits,s.TotalBlockFee,s.ExchangeFee,s.ExchangeFeeUnits,s.TotalExchangeFee,
              s.StripProductCode,s.StripProductPrice,s.ExerciseDate,s.LastUpdated,s.ExerciseType,s.TimeProfile,s.Subcommodity,s.PremiumPrice,s.IsCapInstrument,
              s.isAsianOption,s.TradeType,s.isSubProduct,s.PremiumPaidUpfrontDate,s.PremiumPaidAcrossDeal,s.HasSubProducts,
              s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate, 1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create df_log dataframe to insert into controldb logging tables

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table: electricitydeal: END
# Table: electricitydealexpansion: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="electricitydealexpansion"

#Create Silver Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    DealId STRING,
    DealLeg TINYINT,
    Price DECIMAL(18,2),
    Volume DECIMAL(18,2),
    PremiumPrice DECIMAL(18,2),
    OptionPremium DECIMAL(18,2),
    IntervalFlag INT,
    Interval SMALLINT,
    SettlementDate  TIMESTAMP,
	CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCOps INT,
	CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
	HashKey STRING,
	HashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get bronze table latest records
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                SELECT DealId,DealLeg,Price,Volume,PremiumPrice,OptionPremium,IntervalFlag,Interval,SettlementDate
                FROM deal_export_bronze.electricitydealexpansion
                WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = 1

# Add CDC columns
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "DealId", "DealLeg", "SettlementDate"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Price", "Volume", "PremiumPrice", "OptionPremium", "IntervalFlag", "Interval"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (DealId,DealLeg,Price,Volume,PremiumPrice,OptionPremium,IntervalFlag,Interval,SettlementDate,CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.DealId,s.DealLeg,s.Price,s.Volume,s.PremiumPrice,s.OptionPremium,s.IntervalFlag,s.Interval,s.SettlementDate,s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (DealId,DealLeg,Price,Volume,PremiumPrice,OptionPremium,IntervalFlag,Interval,SettlementDate,CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.DealId,s.DealLeg,s.Price,s.Volume,s.PremiumPrice,s.OptionPremium,s.IntervalFlag,s.Interval,s.SettlementDate,s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create df_log dataframe to insert into controldb logging tables

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table: electricitydealexpansion: END
# Table: exchangeopenposition: START
#Set table name
db_tablename="exchangeopenposition"

#Create Silver Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
(
    OpenPositionDate TIMESTAMP,
    Exchange STRING,
    Clearer STRING,
    ClearingAccount STRING,
    ProductCode STRING,
    DealReference STRING,
    DealId STRING,
    DealLeg INT,
    TradeDate TIMESTAMP,
    BuySell STRING,
    Volume BIGINT,
    Energy BIGINT,
    TradePrice DECIMAL(19,4),
    SettlementPrice DECIMAL(19,4),
    MarkToMarket DECIMAL(19,4),
    VariationMargin DECIMAL(19,4),
    LastUpdated TIMESTAMP,
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
	CDCOps INT,
	CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
	HashKey STRING,
	HashDiff STRING   
)
USING delta
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'

# Get bronze table latest records
df_silver = spark.sql(f"""
                SELECT OpenPositionDate,Exchange,Clearer,ClearingAccount,ProductCode,DealReference,DealId,DealLeg,
                TradeDate,BuySell,Volume,Energy,TradePrice,SettlementPrice,MarkToMarket,VariationMargin,LastUpdated
                FROM deal_export_bronze.exchangeopenposition
                WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = 1

# Add CDC columns
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashKey", sha2(concat_ws("||", "OpenPositionDate", "DealId", "DealLeg"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("HashDiff", sha2(concat_ws("||", "Exchange", "Clearer", "ClearingAccount", "ProductCode", "DealReference", "TradeDate", "BuySell", "Volume", "Energy", "TradePrice", "SettlementPrice", "MarkToMarket", "VariationMargin", "LastUpdated"), 256))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCLoadDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCStartDate", to_timestamp(lit(Silver_LoadDate), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCEndDate", to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCCurrentFlag", lit(1))
df_silver = df_silver.withColumn("CDCOps", lit(1))

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]

# SCD2 logic
# Create a temporary view of the dataframe
df_silver.createOrReplaceTempView("temp_table")

# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (OpenPositionDate,Exchange,Clearer,ClearingAccount,ProductCode,DealReference,DealId,DealLeg,
              TradeDate,BuySell,Volume,Energy,TradePrice,SettlementPrice,MarkToMarket,VariationMargin,LastUpdated,  
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.OpenPositionDate,s.Exchange,s.Clearer,s.ClearingAccount,s.ProductCode,s.DealReference,s.DealId,s.DealLeg,
              s.TradeDate,s.BuySell,s.Volume,s.Energy,s.TradePrice,s.SettlementPrice,s.MarkToMarket,s.VariationMargin,s.LastUpdated,
              s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)
""")

# Use the merge operation to Insert updated record 
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_table s
    ON t.HashKey = s.HashKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Silver_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
      INSERT (OpenPositionDate,Exchange,Clearer,ClearingAccount,ProductCode,DealReference,DealId,DealLeg,
              TradeDate,BuySell,Volume,Energy,TradePrice,SettlementPrice,MarkToMarket,VariationMargin,LastUpdated,  
              CDCLoadDate,CDCStartDate,CDCEndDate,CDCOps,CDCCurrentFlag,HashKey,HashDiff)
      VALUES (s.OpenPositionDate,s.Exchange,s.Clearer,s.ClearingAccount,s.ProductCode,s.DealReference,s.DealId,s.DealLeg,
              s.TradeDate,s.BuySell,s.Volume,s.Energy,s.TradePrice,s.SettlementPrice,s.MarkToMarket,s.VariationMargin,s.LastUpdated,
              s.CDCLoadDate,s.CDCStartDate,s.CDCEndDate,1,s.CDCCurrentFlag,s.HashKey,s.HashDiff)

#Row count parameters
Silver_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Silver_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Silver_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Silver_Update = Silver_Update_Post - Silver_Update_Pre
Silver_Insert = (Silver_Insert_Post - Silver_Insert_Pre) + Silver_Update
Silver_Delete = Silver_Delete_Post - Silver_Delete_Pre
Silver_ActiveRows = Silver_ActiveRecord_Post 
Silver_TotalRows = Silver_TotalRowCount_Post

#Create df_log dataframe to insert into controldb logging tables

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Silver_LoadDate,Silver_Insert,Silver_Update,Silver_Delete,Silver_ActiveRows,Silver_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
# Table: exchangeopenposition: END
